# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a simple GitHub Actions workflow for our application CI. On every push, install dependencies, run unit tests, build the application, and deploy to our staging environment. Focus on speed - we want fast feedback for developers. We'll add security scanning later.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI/CD Pipeline

on: push

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build and Test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: 14

    - name: Cache dependencies
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: '**/node_modules'
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-modules-${{ hashFiles('**/yarn.lock') }}

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: yarn install --frozen-lockfile

    - name: Run tests
      run: yarn test

    - name: Build
      run: yarn build

  deploy:
    needs: build
    name: Deploy to Staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: 14

    - name: Install deployment dependencies
      run: yarn global add surge

    - name: Deploy staging
      run: surge --project ./build --domain your-staging-domain.com
